announcement.goals.jester: Найдите убийц и объединитесь с ними.
announcement.goals.conductor: Используйте мастер-ключ, чтобы открыть любую дверь в поезде!
announcement.role.the_insane_damned_para: Безумный Проклятый Параноидальный Убийца Смерти, Разрушения и Вафель
announcement.goals.bartender: Смотрите на игроков, которые пьют сквозь стены!
announcement.goals.phantom: Станьте невидимыми, но остерегайтесь столкновений с другими игракоми.
announcement.goals.noisemaker: Оповещайте игроков о вашем местоположении в случае смерти.
announcement.goals.voodoo: Выберите другого игрока, который умрёт с вами.
hud.voodoo.player_deaths_only: Причиной смерти вуду должен быть другой игрок!
hud.coroner.sanity_requirements: Необходимо 50% рассудка, чтобы использовать эту способность
announcement.goals.executioner: Станьте убийцей, как только ваша цель умрет (от рук не-убийцы).
announcement.goals.recaller: Телепортируйтесь в любое место на поезде!
announcement.goals.vulture: Пожирайте чужие тела, чтобы стать убийцей.
item.noellesroles.defense_vial.tooltip:
Щелкните ПКМ по подносу с едой/напитками, чтобы использовать
Очищает всё содержимое подноса от яда
Даёт дополнительную жизнь любому, кто выпьет защищённый напиток
Не видно другим игрокам.
item.noellesroles.delusion_vial.tooltip:
Щелкните ПКМ по подносу с едой/напитками, чтобы использовать
Поддельный яд, который работает как обычный,
но не может причинить вреда жертве.
shop.noellesroles.power_restoration_unav: There is no blackout right now, cannot purchase
announcement.goals.noellesroles.jester: Find and co-operate with the Killers.
announcement.goals.noellesroles.conducto: Use the master key to open up every door on the train!
announcement.role.noellesroles.the_insan: The Insane Damned Paranoid Killer Of Doom Death Destruction And Waffles
announcement.goals.noellesroles.bartende: See players that drink through walls!
announcement.goals.noellesroles.phantom: Turn invisible; but watch out for collisions.
announcement.goals.noellesroles.noisemak: Alert players of your location upon death.
announcement.goals.noellesroles.voodoo: Choose another player to go down with you.
announcement.goals.noellesroles.executio: Become a killer once your target dies (to a non-killer).
announcement.goals.noellesroles.trapper: Trap a group of people to find their role.
announcement.goals.noellesroles.recaller: Teleport to anywhere on the train!
announcement.goals.noellesroles.guesser: Guess civilian's roles to kill them instantly!
announcement.goals.noellesroles.mimic: You look like a killer cohort to other killers!
announcement.goals.noellesroles.vulture: Eat bodies to turn into a killer.
item.noellesroles.role_mine.tooltip:
Right click to Place down on Floors or Ceilings.
Invisible to other players, both placed and in hand.
item.noellesroles.toolbox.tooltip:
Right-click on a door blasted by a crowbar to repair it.
Cooldown: 20 seconds
item.noellesroles.capture_device.tooltip:
Capture devices can be placed on the floor or ceiling. This item is invisible to other players when held.
When placed on the floor, it will detect everyone except yourself.
nIf 1 or more players pass through the area, all players in the area (except yourself) will be immobilized for 5 seconds.\nA report will also be generated, recording the names of the captured players.
item.noellesroles.power_restoration.tool:
When in a power outage state, using the Power Restoration System can immediately eliminate one power outage effect.
Facing unexpected darkness, the Power Restoration System will perform its intended function.
item.noellesroles.capture_report.tooltip: You captured %s people with the Capture Device. Their names are:
tip.master_key_invisible_count: Master Keys look like lockpicks with less than %s people.
tip.trapper.caught: You caught %s players in your trap. Their roles were:
announcement.goals.noellesroles.controll: Possess other players' bodies and control them.
tip.controller.possess: Use %s to select a player to possess
announcement.goals.noellesroles.brainwas: Brainwash innocents to become your accomplice...
tip.brainwasher.brainwashed: You have been brainwashed into a killer...
announcement.goals.noellesroles.goddess: Save those who have fallen into darkness...
